name: InstalledCertificates
summary: The InstalledCertificates collector returns information about installed certificates.

fields.name: issued_to
fields.description: The subject field identifies the entity associated with the public key stored in the subject public key field.

fields.name: issued_by
fields.description: Identifies the entity that has signed and issued the certificate.

fields.name: expiration_date
fields.description: Indicates the expiration date of the certificate.

fields.name: purposes
fields.description: The key usage extension defines the purpose (for example, encipherment, signature, and certificate signing) of the key obtained in the certificate. The usage restriction might be employed when a key that could be sent for more than one operation is to be restricted.

fields.name: purposes_extended
fields.description: This extension indicates one or more purposes where the certified public key might be used, in addition to or in place of the basic purposes indicated in the key usage extension. In general, this extension appears only in end entity certificates. Optional ( Extended Key Usage on Linux and Enhanced Key Usage on Windows).

fields.name: friendly_name
fields.description: Displays a more friendly name of the certificate. (Windows only).

examples.title: Example: Show the installed certificates issued by Intel
